attractions.name: Mawlynnong Village
attractions.description: Often referred to as the 'cleanest village in Asia,' known for its immaculate surroundings, bamboo walkways, and strong community-led sustainability practices
attractions.hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Closed to tourists on Sundays)

attractions.name: Living Root Bridge (Mawlynnong)
attractions.description: A naturally grown bridge made from interwoven tree roots—an incredible example of bio-engineering shaped over decades

attractions.name: Mawlynnong
attractions.description: Asia's cleanest village, famous for its village upkeep, living root bridges, balancing rock, and skywalk
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

attractions.name: Single Living Root Bridge
attractions.description: The village has smaller root bridges; the bigger double root bridges are in other parts of the district
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Anitha- North East.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Mawlynnong follows strict cleanliness rules — avoid littering
